element_introduction_order.mastery_context: cars speed across street at bottom of screen, fire bullets at player

notable_level_patterns.description: Level 1 features enemy cars moving horizontally across the bottom of the screen while firing projectiles. Sprites partially rendered off-screen in North American version.
